Chelsea's recruitment policy has reportedly left Antonio Conte feeling frustrated, with speculation that he could leave for a new challenge in the summer. And Lampard, who made more than 600 appearances during a 13-year spell at Stamford Bridge, sympathises with the Italian's situation.

"The manager isn't happy and he obviously feels his squad is a bit thin to battle on so many different fronts," he continued.

"And I think he's been proved correct to a degree because when you win the title and then lose big players like Costa and Matic, you have to recruit to move forward because everyone else is doing that.

"Antonio Conte certainly seems frustrated. He doesn't mince his words and he's been pretty honest about how he feels. I don't know where things are headed long-term but I think the club and manager will need to sit down in the summer to sort things out."

With the reigning champions 15 points behind Premier League leaders City, Lampard believes Roman Abramovich will continue to spend heavily to challenge for honours.

"Mr. Abramovich is not the sort of person to accept just finishing in the top four. That's why the club have been so successful over the last 15 years," he added.

"Chelsea spent something like £190m last summer but the landscape is constantly changing and you have to spend even more these days if you're going to get the top players.

"But I do believe the club will react to the challenge of the Manchester clubs and continue to fight for the major titles."

外借update:
Batshuayi: 尋晚應該係Batshuayi今季最後一次為車路士上陣，只要簽到前鋒就會外借出去，羅馬另一位前鋒Schick受傷，所以Batshuayi可能會成為Dzeko既交易籌碼之一，另外西維爾同多蒙特都對佢有興趣。
Baba: 車路士已經批准Baba去史浩克04跟操，但兩間球會仍未就交易達成最終協議，包括租借年期(半年/一年半)，同埋有冇買斷費用。
Musonda: 球會簽到Barkley時已經通知Musonda可以外借離隊，亦安排佢踢幾場U23比賽操fit體能同吸外其他球會報價。球會希望Musonda外借英超球會吸收英超比賽經驗，而Musonda就大力反對，拒絕左般尼茅夫同西甲意甲球會既邀請，選擇左蘇超既些路迪，外借年期為1年半。
Pantic: Partizan有意買斷Pantic，兩間球會正商討轉會費
Ampadu/Sterling: 雖然有英超英冠球會想租借呢兩位年青球員，但我估計兩位都會留隊做替補，下年先會外借。
Palmer: 因為受傷缺席上半季所有賽事，Huddersfield亦唔想冒險用一個狀態唔fit既球員，所以車路士提早將Palmer召回。Palmer呢個月係車路士跟操恢復狀態，預計轉會窗完結前會外借到英冠，暫時Birmingham, Sheffield United, Sheffield Wednesday都表示有興趣。
無人問津: K.Hazard, Wallace, Feruz, Beeney

-------

Dzeko經理人表示談判仍然繼續 Dzeko要求3年半合約 車路士尚未答覆

據西班牙媒體《足球先生》報導，C羅不僅是球場上的主角，也同樣是轉會市場上的主角。
對於這個金球先生的未來，很多人都知道，他已經離皇馬很遠很遠了。
雖然C羅發揮出色，但是，皇馬高層依然把他放入交易名單中。
此次，皇馬主席弗洛倫蒂諾的想法是把C羅放入和切爾西的交易中，銀河戰艦希望得到阿扎爾。
皇馬在和切爾西的接觸中，皇馬提出希望給出C羅，然後帶走阿扎爾。但是，藍軍的反應和巴黎的反應一樣，他們並不想要葡萄牙巨星。
切爾西表示，球隊不需要一名33歲的球員，他們希望得到皇馬的另外一人，他就是被譽為皇馬王儲的阿森西奧。
